event: converted to emergency Roux-en-Y gastric bypass surgery
high dose intravenous calcium (4.4 mmol five times daily)
intravenous calcium gluconate 4.4 mmol five times daily
intravenous calcitriol recommenced 1 µg alternate daily
calcium gluconate reduced to 4.4 mmol three times per day
recovered sufficiently to recommence oral intake
normocalcaemia at follow-ups (6 weeks, 12 weeks, 4 months)
